☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ He sighs and shakes the thoughts away, finally having made it to the pub and now walking inside. Without a second thought does he head over to the bar, sitting down on some shoddy stool. That really didn’t matter to him right now since he just really needed a drink. “Whiskey,” he mutters to the bartender who had just walked over to him, not bothering to even look over at the guy. He shuts his eyes and pinches the bridge of his nose, hoping to get rid of the incoming headache before it fully formed. Once he hears the clink of a glass being set down in front of him, he opens his eyes and grabs the drink.

He’s about to down the whole thing when his attention is pulled towards some fucker who had just walked up to him and started talking. What they were talking about he had no fucking clue since he didn’t care. His tail slowly whips behind him, the end shaking and rattling like a snake warning an enemy to stay away. His lips form a sneer and it’s pretty clear that he wants them to leave him alone. But do they do that? No. Of course not. For fucks sake- Has he just lost it? Is the infamous assassin Striker just a joke now? Hell, if they don’t back the fuck up he’s gonna- ❞
creator: AyoIdk
